```typescript
'use client';

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';

export default function SignupPage() {
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState('');
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const router = useRouter();
  const { signup } = useAuth();

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');

    if (password !== confirmPassword) {
      setError('Passwords do not match');
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);

    const result = await signup(username, password, email || undefined);

    if (result.success) {
      router.push('/');
    } else {
      setError(result.error || 'Signup failed');
    }

    setIsLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center">
      <div className="bg-white p-8 rounded-lg shadow-md w-96">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-center text-gray-900">Create Account</h1>
        
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="username" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
              Username *
            </label>
            <input
              type="text"
              id="username"
              value={username}
              onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-gray-900"
              required
              minLength={3}
              maxLength={30}
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="email" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
              Email (optional - for password recovery)
            </label>
            <input
              type="email"
              id="email"
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-gray-900"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="password" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
              Password *
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              id="password"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-gray-900"
              required
              minLength={8}
            />
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">At least 8 characters</p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="confirmPassword" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
              Confirm Password *
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              id="confirmPassword"
              value={confirmPassword}
              onChange={(e) => setConfirmPassword(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-gray-900"
              required
            />
          </div>

          {error && (
            <div className="text-red-500 text-sm">{error}</div>
          )}

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={isLoading}
            className="w-full bg-blue-600 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {isLoading ? 'Creating Account...' : 'Sign Up'}
          </button>
        </form>

        <p className="mt-4 text-center text-sm text-gray-600">
          Already have an account?{' '}
          <Link href="/login" className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800">
            Log in
          </Link>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

### 6.2 User Login Page

**File:** `/home/rick/Documents/D/PRJ/LRG/futureisnear/src/app/login/page.tsx`

```typescript
'use client';

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';

export default function LoginPage() {
  const [username, setUsername] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const router = useRouter();
  const { login } = useAuth();

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');
    setIsLoading(true);

    const result = await login(username, password);

    if (result.success) {
      router.push('/');
    } else {
      setError(result.error || 'Login failed');
    }

    setIsLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center">
      <div className="bg-white p-8 rounded-lg shadow-md w-96">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-center text-gray-900">Log In</h1>
        
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="username" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
              Username
            </label>
            <input
              type="text"
              id="username"
              value={username}
              onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-gray-900"
              required
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="password" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
              Password
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              id="password"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 text-gray-900"
              required
            />
          </div>

          {error && (
            <div className="text-red-500 text-sm">{error}</div>
          )}

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={isLoading}
            className="w-full bg-blue-600 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:opacity-50"
          >
            {isLoading ? 'Logging in...' : 'Log In'}
          </button>
        </form>

        <div className="mt-4 text-center space-y-2">
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
            Don&apos;t have an account?{' '}
            <Link href="/signup" className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800">
              Sign up
            </Link>
          </p>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
            <Link href="/forgot-password" className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800">
              Forgot password?
            </Link>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

### 6.3 Header User State Component

**File:** `/home/rick/Documents/D/PRJ/LRG/futureisnear/src/components/UserMenu.tsx`

```typescript
'use client';

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useAuth } from '@/hooks/useAuth';
import { User, LogOut, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react';

export default function UserMenu() {
  const { user, loading, isAuthenticated, logout } = useAuth();
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 animate-pulse" />
    );
  }

  if (!isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Link
          href="/login"
          className="text-white hover:text-blue-200 text-sm font-medium"
        >
          Log In
        </Link>
        <Link
          href="/signup"
          className="bg-white text-blue-600 px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-50"
        >
          Sign Up
        </Link>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="relative">
      <button
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className="flex items-center gap-2 text-white hover:text-blue-200"
      >
        <User className="w-5 h-5" />
        <span className="text-sm font-medium">{user?.username}</span>
        <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 transition-transform ${isOpen ? 'rotate-180' : ''}`} />
      </button>

      {isOpen && (
        <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-md shadow-lg py-1 z-50">
          <div className="px-4 py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{user?.username}</p>
            {user?.email && (
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{user.email}</p>
            )}
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              logout();
              setIsOpen(false);
            }}
            className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2"
          >
            <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
            Log Out
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescript

## 9. Implementation Order

1. **Add dependencies** - `bcrypt`, `jsonwebtoken`
2. **Update Prisma schema** - Add User and PasswordResetToken models
3. **Run migration** - `npx prisma db push`
4. **Create auth utilities** - `/src/lib/userAuth.ts`
5. **Create API routes** - signup, login, me
6. **Create useAuth hook** - `/src/hooks/useAuth.ts`
7. **Create pages** - /signup, /login
8. **Create UserMenu component** - Header user state
9. **Update FutureNews** - Add UserMenu to header
10. **Test thoroughly**
11. **(Later)** Implement password recovery

---

## 10. Security Considerations

1. **Password hashing**: bcrypt with 12 salt rounds
2. **JWT secret**: Use a long, random string in production
3. **Token expiry**: 7 days for user tokens
4. **Rate limiting**: Consider adding for login/signup endpoints (future enhancement)
5. **HTTPS**: Ensure production uses HTTPS
6. **Input validation**: Username length, password strength
7. **Lowercase emails/usernames**: Prevent duplicate accounts

```md
# User Authentication System Implementation Plan

## Overview
Add signup/login functionality for public users with optional email (for password recovery). Keep existing admin auth intact.

## Dependencies to Install
\```bash
npm install bcrypt jsonwebtoken
npm install -D @types/bcrypt @types/jsonwebtoken
\```

## Database Changes

**File:** `prisma/schema.prisma`

Add User model:
\```prisma
model User {
  id            String    @id @default(cuid())
  username      String    @unique
  email         String?   @unique
  passwordHash  String
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt

  @@index([email])
}
\```

Run: `npx prisma db push`

## Environment Variables

Add to `.env.local`:
\```
JWT_SECRET=your-super-secret-jwt-key-at-least-32-characters
\```

## New Files to Create

### 1. Auth Utility - `src/lib/userAuth.ts`
- `verifyUserToken(token)` - Verify JWT and return payload
- `getUserFromRequest(request)` - Extract user from Authorization header
- JWT payload: `{ type: 'user', userId, username }`
- 7-day token expiry

### 2. API Routes

**`src/app/api/auth/signup/route.ts`** (POST)
- Accepts: `{ username, password, email? }`
- Validates: username 3-30 chars, password 8+ chars
- Checks uniqueness of username and email
- Hashes password with bcrypt (12 rounds)
- Returns JWT token + user info

**`src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts`** (POST)
- Accepts: `{ username, password }`
- Validates credentials against database
- Returns JWT token + user info

**`src/app/api/auth/me/route.ts`** (GET)
- Requires Authorization header
- Returns current user info
- Used for session validation on page load

### 3. Client Hook - `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`
- `useAuth()` hook providing:
  - `user`, `loading`, `isAuthenticated`
  - `login(username, password)`
  - `signup(username, password, email?)`
  - `logout()`
- Token stored in `localStorage` as `user_token`

### 4. Frontend Pages

**`src/app/signup/page.tsx`**
- Form: username*, password*, confirm password*, email (optional)
- Shows note that email is for password recovery
- On success: stores token, redirects to /

**`src/app/login/page.tsx`**
- Form: username, password
- Links to signup and forgot-password
- On success: stores token, redirects to /

**`src/app/forgot-password/page.tsx`** (placeholder for now)
- Simple message: "Password recovery coming soon. Contact support."

### 5. User Menu Component - `src/components/UserMenu.tsx`
- Shows "Log In | Sign Up" buttons when not authenticated
- Shows username + dropdown menu when authenticated
- Dropdown has logout option

### 6. Update FutureNews Header
**File:** `src/components/FutureNews.tsx`
- Import and add `<UserMenu />` to header

## Token Strategy
- **User tokens**: JWT with `{ type: 'user', userId, username }`, 7-day expiry
- **Admin tokens**: Keep existing base64 format (backward compatible)
- Stored separately: `user_token` vs `admin_token` in localStorage

## Implementation Order
1. Install dependencies
2. Add JWT_SECRET to .env.local
3. Update Prisma schema + run migration
4. Create `src/lib/userAuth.ts`
5. Create API routes (signup, login, me)
6. Create `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`
7. Create pages (signup, login, forgot-password placeholder)
8. Create `src/components/UserMenu.tsx`
9. Update FutureNews.tsx header
10. Test manually
11. Commit

## Verification Steps
1. Start dev server: `npm run dev`
2. Navigate to /signup - create account with username/password
3. Verify redirect to home, see username in header
4. Click logout, verify buttons return
5. Navigate to /login - log in with created account
6. Verify session persists on page refresh
7. Test invalid credentials show error
8. Test duplicate username shows error

```

```typescript
import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || "fallback-secret-do-not-use-in-production";

export interface UserTokenPayload {
  type: "user";
  userId: string;
  username: string;
  iat: number;
  exp: number;
}

export function createUserToken(userId: string, username: string): string {
  return jwt.sign(
    {
      type: "user",
      userId,
      username,
    },
    JWT_SECRET,
    { expiresIn: "7d" }
  );
}

export function verifyUserToken(token: string): UserTokenPayload | null {
  try {
    const payload = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET) as UserTokenPayload;

    if (payload.type !== "user") {
      return null;
    }

    return payload;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export function getUserFromRequest(request: Request): UserTokenPayload | null {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");

  if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith("Bearer ")) {
    return null;
  }

  const token = authHeader.replace("Bearer ", "");
  return verifyUserToken(token);
}

export function userUnauthorizedResponse() {
  return NextResponse.json(
    { error: "Authentication required" },
    { status: 401 }
  );
}

```

```typescript
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import bcrypt from "bcrypt";
import { createUserToken } from "@/lib/userAuth";

const SALT_ROUNDS = 12;

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  try {
    const { username, password, email } = await request.json();

    // Validation
    if (!username || !password) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Username and password are required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const trimmedUsername = username.trim().toLowerCase();
    const trimmedEmail = email?.trim().toLowerCase() || null;

    if (trimmedUsername.length < 3 || trimmedUsername.length > 30) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Username must be 3-30 characters" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    if (!/^[a-z0-9_]+$/.test(trimmedUsername)) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    if (password.length < 8) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Password must be at least 8 characters" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    if (trimmedEmail && !/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(trimmedEmail)) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Invalid email format" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    // Check if username exists
    const existingUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { username: trimmedUsername },
    });

    if (existingUser) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Username already taken" },
        { status: 409 }
      );
    }

    // Check if email exists (if provided)
    if (trimmedEmail) {
      const existingEmail = await prisma.user.findUnique({
        where: { email: trimmedEmail },
      });
      if (existingEmail) {
        return NextResponse.json(
          { error: "Email already registered" },
          { status: 409 }
        );
      }
    }

    // Hash password
    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, SALT_ROUNDS);

    // Create user
    const user = await prisma.user.create({
      data: {
        username: trimmedUsername,
        email: trimmedEmail,
        passwordHash,
      },
    });

    // Generate JWT
    const token = createUserToken(user.id, user.username);

    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        success: true,
        token,
        user: {
          id: user.id,
          username: user.username,
          email: user.email,
        },
      },
      { status: 201 }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Signup error:", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Failed to create account" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

```

```typescript
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import bcrypt from "bcrypt";
import { createUserToken } from "@/lib/userAuth";

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  try {
    const { username, password } = await request.json();

    if (!username || !password) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Username and password are required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const trimmedUsername = username.trim().toLowerCase();

    // Find user
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { username: trimmedUsername },
    });

    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Invalid credentials" },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }

    // Verify password
    const validPassword = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.passwordHash);

    if (!validPassword) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Invalid credentials" },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }

    // Generate JWT
    const token = createUserToken(user.id, user.username);

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      token,
      user: {
        id: user.id,
        username: user.username,
        email: user.email,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Login error:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Login failed" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import { getUserFromRequest } from "@/lib/userAuth";

export async function GET(request: Request) {
  try {
    const payload = getUserFromRequest(request);

    if (!payload) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Invalid or expired token" },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }

    // Get fresh user data
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { id: payload.userId },
      select: {
        id: true,
        username: true,
        email: true,
        createdAt: true,
      },
    });

    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "User not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ user });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Auth me error:", error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Authentication check failed" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

```typescript
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";

interface User {
  id: string;
  username: string;
  email: string | null;
}

interface AuthState {
  user: User | null;
  loading: boolean;
  error: string | null;
}

export function useAuth() {
  const [state, setState] = useState<AuthState>({
    user: null,
    loading: true,
    error: null,
  });

  const checkAuth = useCallback(async () => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem("user_token");

    if (!token) {
      setState({ user: null, loading: false, error: null });
      return;
    }

    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/auth/me", {
        headers: {
          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
        },
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setState({ user: data.user, loading: false, error: null });
      } else {
        localStorage.removeItem("user_token");
        setState({ user: null, loading: false, error: null });
      }
    } catch {
      setState({ user: null, loading: false, error: "Failed to check auth" });
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    checkAuth();
  }, [checkAuth]);

  const login = async (username: string, password: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/auth/login", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ username, password }),
      });

      const data = await response.json();

      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error || "Login failed");
      }

      localStorage.setItem("user_token", data.token);
      setState({ user: data.user, loading: false, error: null });
      return { success: true };
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Login failed";
      setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, error: message }));
      return { success: false, error: message };
    }
  };

  const signup = async (username: string, password: string, email?: string) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/auth/signup", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ username, password, email }),
      });

      const data = await response.json();

      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error || "Signup failed");
      }

      localStorage.setItem("user_token", data.token);
      setState({ user: data.user, loading: false, error: null });
      return { success: true };
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Signup failed";
      setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, error: message }));
      return { success: false, error: message };
    }
  };

  const logout = () => {
    localStorage.removeItem("user_token");
    setState({ user: null, loading: false, error: null });
  };

  return {
    user: state.user,
    loading: state.loading,
    error: state.error,
    isAuthenticated: !!state.user,
    login,
    signup,
    logout,
    checkAuth,
  };
}

```

"use client";

import React, { useState } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useAuth } from "@/hooks/useAuth";

export default function SignupPage() {
  const [username, setUsername] = useState("");
  const [password, setPassword] = useState("");
  const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState("");
  const [email, setEmail] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState("");
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const router = useRouter();
  const { signup } = useAuth();

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError("");

    if (password !== confirmPassword) {
      setError("Passwords do not match");
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);

    const result = await signup(username, password, email || undefined);

    if (result.success) {
      router.push("/");
    } else {
      setError(result.error || "Signup failed");
    }

    setIsLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center px-4">
      <div className="bg-white p-8 rounded-lg shadow-md w-full max-w-md">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-center text-gray-900">
          Create Account
        </h1>

        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label
              htmlFor="username"
              className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
            >
              Username <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
            </label>
            <input
              type="text"
              id="username"
              value={username}
              onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 text-gray-900"
              required
              minLength={3}
              maxLength={30}
              pattern="[a-zA-Z0-9_]+"
              title="Letters, numbers, and underscores only"
            />
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
              3-30 characters, letters, numbers, underscores
            </p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <label
              htmlFor="email"
              className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
            >
              Email{" "}
              <span className="text-gray-400 font-normal">(optional)</span>
            </label>
            <input
              type="email"
              id="email"
              value={email}
              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 text-gray-900"
            />
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
              Only needed if you want password recovery
            </p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <label
              htmlFor="password"
              className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
            >
              Password <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              id="password"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 text-gray-900"
              required
              minLength={8}
            />
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">At least 8 characters</p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <label
              htmlFor="confirmPassword"
              className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
            >
              Confirm Password <span className="text-red-500">*</span>
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              id="confirmPassword"

              onChange={(e) => setConfirmPassword(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 text-gray-900"
              required
            />

          )}

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={isLoading}
            className="w-full bg-blue-600 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:bg-gray-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
          >
            {isLoading ? "Creating Account..." : "Sign Up"}
          </button>
        </form>

        <p className="mt-4 text-center text-sm text-gray-600">

          <Link href="/login" className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800">
            Log in
          </Link>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>

"use client";

import React, { useState } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useAuth } from "@/hooks/useAuth";

export default function LoginPage() {
  const [username, setUsername] = useState("");
  const [password, setPassword] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState("");
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
  const router = useRouter();
  const { login } = useAuth();

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError("");
    setIsLoading(true);

    const result = await login(username, password);

    if (result.success) {
      router.push("/");
    } else {
      setError(result.error || "Login failed");
    }

    setIsLoading(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center px-4">
      <div className="bg-white p-8 rounded-lg shadow-md w-full max-w-md">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-center text-gray-900">
          Log In
        </h1>

        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label
              htmlFor="username"
              className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
            >
              Username
            </label>
            <input
              type="text"
              id="username"
              value={username}
              onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 text-gray-900"
              required
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label
              htmlFor="password"
              className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700"
            >
              Password
            </label>
            <input
              type="password"
              id="password"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              className="mt-1 w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 text-gray-900"
              required
            />
          </div>

          {error && (
            <div className="bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-md text-sm">
              {error}
            </div>
          )}

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={isLoading}
            className="w-full bg-blue-600 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded-md hover:bg-blue-700 disabled:bg-gray-400 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
          >
            {isLoading ? "Logging in..." : "Log In"}
          </button>
        </form>

        <div className="mt-4 text-center space-y-2">
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
            Don&apos;t have an account?{" "}
            <Link href="/signup" className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800">
              Sign up
            </Link>
          </p>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
            <Link
              href="/forgot-password"
              className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800"
            >
              Forgot password?
            </Link>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

"use client";

import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useAuth } from "@/hooks/useAuth";
import { User, LogOut, ChevronDown } from "lucide-react";

export default function UserMenu() {
  const { user, loading, isAuthenticated, logout } = useAuth();
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  // Close menu when clicking outside
  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(event: MouseEvent) {
      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {
        setIsOpen(false);
      }
    }

    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
  }, []);

  if (loading) {
    return <div className="w-20 h-8 rounded bg-blue-500/30 animate-pulse" />;
  }

  if (!isAuthenticated) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Link
          href="/login"
          className="text-white hover:text-blue-200 text-sm font-medium px-2 py-1"
        >
          Log In
        </Link>
        <Link
          href="/signup"
          className="bg-white text-blue-600 px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-50"
        >
          Sign Up
        </Link>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="relative" ref={menuRef}>
      <button
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-white hover:text-blue-200 px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
      >
        <User className="w-4 h-4" />
        <span className="text-sm font-medium">{user?.username}</span>
        <ChevronDown
          className={`w-3 h-3 transition-transform ${isOpen ? "rotate-180" : ""}`}
        />
      </button>

      {isOpen && (
        <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 bg-white rounded-md shadow-lg py-1 z-50">
          <div className="px-4 py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
              {user?.username}
            </p>
            {user?.email && (
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 truncate">{user.email}</p>
            )}
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              logout();
              setIsOpen(false);
            }}
            className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2"
          >
            <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
            Log Out
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

    11→

    14→**File:** `prisma/schema.prisma`
    15→
    16→Add User model:
    17→```prisma
    18→model User {
    19→  id            String    @id @default(cuid())
    20→  username      String    @unique
    21→  email         String?   @unique
    22→  passwordHash  String
    23→  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now())
    24→  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt
    25→
    26→  @@index([email])
    27→}
    28→```
    29→

    32→## Environment Variables
    33→

    38→
    39→## New Files to Create
    40→
    41→### 1. Auth Utility - `src/lib/userAuth.ts`
    42→- `verifyUserToken(token)` - Verify JWT and return payload
    43→- `getUserFromRequest(request)` - Extract user from Authorization header
    44→- JWT payload: `{ type: 'user', userId, username }`
    45→- 7-day token expiry
    46→
    47→### 2. API Routes
    48→
    49→**`src/app/api/auth/signup/route.ts`** (POST)
    50→- Accepts: `{ username, password, email? }`
    51→- Validates: username 3-30 chars, password 8+ chars
    52→- Checks uniqueness of username and email
    53→- Hashes password with bcrypt (12 rounds)
    54→- Returns JWT token + user info
    55→
    56→**`src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts`** (POST)
    57→- Accepts: `{ username, password }`
    58→- Validates credentials against database
    59→- Returns JWT token + user info
    60→
    61→**`src/app/api/auth/me/route.ts`** (GET)
    62→- Requires Authorization header
    63→- Returns current user info
    64→- Used for session validation on page load
    65→
    66→### 3. Client Hook - `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`
    67→- `useAuth()` hook providing:
    68→  - `user`, `loading`, `isAuthenticated`
    69→  - `login(username, password)`
    70→  - `signup(username, password, email?)`
    71→  - `logout()`
    72→- Token stored in `localStorage` as `user_token`
    73→
    74→### 4. Frontend Pages
    75→

### 1. **Favorite Model (Prisma Schema)**
**File:** `/home/rick/Documents/D/PRJ/LRG/futureisnear/prisma/schema.prisma` (lines 30-40)

Current structure:
```prisma
model Favorite {
  id  String  @id @default(cuid())
  storyId   String
  userId  String   // IP address or session ID for anonymous users
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  story Story   @relation(fields: [storyId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([storyId, userId])
  @@index([userId])
}
```

**Key observations:**
- Uses IP-based anonymous user tracking
- One-to-many relationship with Story (via `favorites Favorite[]`)
- Enforces unique constraint on (storyId, userId) pairs
- No voting/boost field yet

### 2. **Story Model (Prisma Schema)**

model Story {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())

  description  String?
  category  String
  author    String?  @default("Unknown Author")
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
  publicationMonth Int?    // Month (1-12)
  publicationYear Int?    // Year (ex. 2025)
  favorites Favorite[] 
  @@index([category])
}
```

**What's needed for voting:** No `boost`, `votes`, or `score` field yet.

     1→import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2→import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
     3→import { headers } from "next/headers";
     4→
     5→// Get user identifier (IP address for now)
     6→async function getUserId() {
     7→  const headersList = await headers();
     8→  const forwarded = headersList.get("x-forwarded-for");
     9→  const ip = forwarded
    10→    ? forwarded.split(",")[0]
    11→    : headersList.get("x-real-ip") || "unknown";
    12→  return `user_${ip}`;
    13→}
    14→
    15→// GET - Get all favorites for current user
    16→export async function GET() {
    17→  try {
    18→    const userId = await getUserId();
    19→
    20→    const favorites = await prisma.favorite.findMany({
    21→      where: {
    22→        userId,
    23→      },
    24→      select: {
    25→        storyId: true,
    26→      },
    27→    });
    28→
    29→    const favoriteIds = favorites.map((f: { storyId: string }) => f.storyId);
    30→
    31→    return NextResponse.json({ favoriteIds });
    32→  } catch (error) {
    33→    console.error("Error fetching favorites:", error);
    34→    return NextResponse.json(
    35→      { error: "Failed to fetch favorites" },
    36→      { status: 500 },
    37→    );
    38→  }
    39→}
    40→
    41→// POST - Add a favorite (NO AUTH REQUIRED - public feature)
    42→export async function POST(request: Request) {
    43→  try {
    44→    const userId = await getUserId();
    45→    const body = await request.json();
    46→    const { storyId } = body;
    47→
    48→    if (!storyId) {
    49→      return NextResponse.json(
    50→        { error: "Story ID is required" },
    51→        { status: 400 },
    52→      );
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    // Check if already favorited
    56→    const existing = await prisma.favorite.findUnique({
    57→      where: {
    58→        storyId_userId: {
    59→          storyId,
    60→          userId,
    61→        },
    62→      },
    63→    });
    64→
    65→    if (existing) {
    66→      return NextResponse.json({
    67→        message: "Already favorited",
    68→        favorited: true,
    69→      });
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    // Create favorite
    73→    await prisma.favorite.create({
    74→      data: {
    75→        storyId,
    76→        userId,
    77→      },
    78→    });
    79→
    80→    return NextResponse.json({
    81→      message: "Favorite added",
    82→      favorited: true,
    83→    });
    84→  } catch (error) {
    85→    console.error("Error adding favorite:", error);
    86→    return NextResponse.json(
    87→      { error: "Failed to add favorite" },
    88→      { status: 500 },
    89→    );
    90→  }
    91→}
    92→
    93→// DELETE - Remove a favorite (NO AUTH REQUIRED - public feature)
    94→export async function DELETE(request: Request) {
    95→  try {
    96→    const userId = await getUserId();
    97→    const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
    98→    const storyId = searchParams.get("storyId");
    99→
   100→    if (!storyId) {
   101→      return NextResponse.json(
   102→        { error: "Story ID is required" },
   103→        { status: 400 },
   104→      );
   105→    }
   106→
   107→    await prisma.favorite.deleteMany({
   108→      where: {
   109→        storyId,
   110→        userId,
   111→      },
   112→    });
   113→
   114→    return NextResponse.json({
   115→      message: "Favorite removed",
   116→      favorited: false,
   117→    });
   118→  } catch (error) {
   119→    console.error("Error removing favorite:", error);
   120→    return NextResponse.json(
   121→      { error: "Failed to remove favorite" },
   122→      { status: 500 },
   123→    );
   124→  }
   125→}
   126→

    19→
    20→export default function FutureNews() {

    33→  // Search states

    37→  const [searchInCategory, setSearchInCategory] = useState(false);
    38→  const [searchInAuthor, setSearchInAuthor] = useState(false);
    39→  const [caseSensitive, setCaseSensitive] = useState(false);
    40→  const [wholeWords, setWholeWords] = useState(false);

    42→  // Favorites filter

    45→  // Sort states
    46→  const [sortField, setSortField] = useState<"date" | "title">("date");
    47→  const [sortDirection, setSortDirection] = useState<"asc" | "desc">("desc");
    48→
    49→  useEffect(() => {
    50→    fetchStories();

    53→
    54→  const fetchStories = async () => {

    56→      setLoading(true);

    62→        // Extract unique categories and add "All" at the beginning
    63→        const uniqueCategories = Array.from(

    65→        ) as string[];

    68→        // Initially show all stories

    88→    }
    89→  };
    90→
    91→  const toggleFavorite = async (storyId: string) => {
    92→    const isFavorited = favorites.has(storyId);
    93→
    94→    // Optimistic update

    96→    if (isFavorited) {

   121→  };
   122→
   123→  // Filter by category when active tab changes

   157→        if (searchInAuthor && story.author) {
   158→          fieldsToSearch.push(story.author);
   159→        }
   160→
   161→        if (fieldsToSearch.length === 0) {
   162→          return false;
   163→        }
   164→
   165→        let pattern: RegExp;
   166→
   167→        if (wholeWords) {
   168→          const escapedQuery = searchQuery.replace(
   169→            /[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,
   170→            "\\$&",
   171→          );
   172→          const regexFlags = caseSensitive ? "g" : "gi";
   173→          pattern = new RegExp(`\\b${escapedQuery}\\b`, regexFlags);
   174→        } else {
   175→          const regexFlags = caseSensitive ? "g" : "gi";
   176→          const escapedQuery = searchQuery.replace(
   177→            /[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,
   178→            "\\$&",
   179→          );
   180→          pattern = new RegExp(escapedQuery, regexFlags);
   181→        }
   182→
   183→        return fieldsToSearch.some((field) => {
   184→          if (wholeWords || !caseSensitive) {
   185→            return pattern.test(field);
   186→          } else {
   187→            return field.includes(searchQuery);
   188→          }
   189→        });
   190→      });
   191→    }
   192→
   193→    // Apply favorites filter
   194→    if (showOnlyFavorites) {
   195→      result = result.filter((story) => favorites.has(story.id));
   196→    }
   197→
   198→    // Apply sorting
   199→    result = [...result].sort((a, b) => {
   200→      if (sortField === "date") {
   201→        const dateA = new Date(a.timestamp).getTime();
   202→        const dateB = new Date(b.timestamp).getTime();
   203→        return sortDirection === "asc" ? dateA - dateB : dateB - dateA;
   204→      } else {
   205→        // Sort by title
   206→        const titleA = a.title.toLowerCase();
   207→        const titleB = b.title.toLowerCase();
   208→        if (sortDirection === "asc") {
   209→          return titleA.localeCompare(titleB);
   210→        } else {
   211→          return titleB.localeCompare(titleA);
   212→        }
   213→      }
   214→    });
   215→
   216→    setFilteredStories(result);
   217→  }, [
   218→    searchQuery,
   219→    searchInTitle,
   220→    searchInDescription,
   221→    searchInCategory,
   222→    searchInAuthor,
   223→    caseSensitive,
   224→    wholeWords,
   225→    categoryFilteredStories,
   226→    showOnlyFavorites,
   227→    favorites,
   228→    sortField,
   229→    sortDirection,
   230→  ]);
   231→
   232→  const handleClearSearch = () => {
   233→    setSearchQuery("");
   234→  };
   235→
   236→  return (
   237→    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
   238→      {/* Header */}
   239→      <header className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-blue-800 p-2 sticky top-0 z-50">
   240→        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 flex justify-between items-center">
   241→          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-white">FutureIsNear</h1>
   242→          <UserMenu />
   243→        </div>
   244→      </header>
   245→
   246→      {/* Category Tabs */}
   247→      <div className="bg-white shadow sticky top-8 z-40 border-b border-gray-200">
   248→        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
   249→          <div className="flex gap-1 overflow-x-auto py-2 scrollbar-hide">
   250→            {categories.map((category) => (
   251→              <button
   252→                key={category}
   253→                onClick={() => setActiveTab(category)}
   254→                className={`px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-colors duration-200 ${
   255→                  activeTab === category
   256→                    ? "bg-blue-600 text-white"
   257→                    : "text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100"
   258→                }`}
   259→              >
   260→                {category}
   261→              </button>
   262→            ))}
   263→          </div>
   264→        </div>
   265→      </div>
   266→
   267→      {/* Main Content */}
   268→      <main className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 py-4">
   269→        {/* Search Box */}
   270→        <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-3 shadow-sm mb-4">
   271→          <div className="space-y-3">
   272→            {/* Search Input */}
   273→            <div className="relative">
   274→              <div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 pl-3 flex items-center pointer-events-none">
   275→                <svg
   276→                  className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400"
   277→                  fill="none"
   278→                  stroke="currentColor"
   279→                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   280→                >
   281→                  <path
   282→                    strokeLinecap="round"
   283→                    strokeLinejoin="round"
   284→                    strokeWidth={2}
   285→                    d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"
   286→                  />
   287→                </svg>
   288→              </div>
   289→              <input
   290→                type="text"
   291→                value={searchQuery}
   292→                onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
   293→                placeholder={`Search in ${activeTab === "All" ? "all categories" : activeTab}...`}
   294→                className="block w-full pl-10 pr-10 py-2 text-sm border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 text-gray-900"
   295→              />
   296→              {searchQuery && (
   297→                <button
   298→                  onClick={handleClearSearch}
   299→                  className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 pr-3 flex items-center text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
   300→                  title="Clear search"
   301→                >
   302→                  <svg
   303→                    className="h-4 w-4"
   304→                    fill="none"
   305→                    stroke="currentColor"
   306→                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   307→                  >
   308→                    <path
   309→                      strokeLinecap="round"
   310→                      strokeLinejoin="round"
   311→                      strokeWidth={2}
   312→                      d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
   313→                    />
   314→                  </svg>
   315→                </button>
   316→              )}
   317→            </div>
   318→
   319→            {/* Search Options */}
   320→            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 text-sm">
   321→              {/* Search Fields with Icons */}
   322→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   323→                <label
   324→                  className="flex items-center cursor-pointer group"
   325→                  title="Search in title"
   326→                >
   327→                  <input
   328→                    type="checkbox"
   329→                    checked={searchInTitle}
   330→                    onChange={(e) => setSearchInTitle(e.target.checked)}
   331→                    className="rounded border-gray-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500 h-4 w-4"
   332→                  />
   333→                  <svg
   334→                    className="w-4 h-4 ml-1.5 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-blue-600"
   335→                    fill="none"
   336→                    stroke="currentColor"
   337→                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   338→                  >
   339→                    <path
   340→                      strokeLinecap="round"
   341→                      strokeLinejoin="round"
   342→                      strokeWidth={2}
   343→                      d="M7 8h10M7 12h4m1 8l-4-4H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-3l-4 4z"
   344→                    />
   345→                  </svg>
   346→                </label>
   347→
   348→                <label
   349→                  className="flex items-center cursor-pointer group"
   350→                  title="Search in description"
   351→                >
   352→                  <input
   353→                    type="checkbox"
   354→                    checked={searchInDescription}
   355→                    onChange={(e) => setSearchInDescription(e.target.checked)}
   356→                    className="rounded border-gray-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500 h-4 w-4"
   357→                  />
   358→                  <svg
   359→                    className="w-4 h-4 ml-1.5 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-blue-600"
   360→                    fill="none"
   361→                    stroke="currentColor"
   362→                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   363→                  >
   364→                    <path
   365→                      strokeLinecap="round"
   366→                      strokeLinejoin="round"
   367→                      strokeWidth={2}
   368→                      d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h7"
   369→                    />
   370→                  </svg>
   371→                </label>
   372→
   373→                <label
   374→                  className="flex items-center cursor-pointer group"
   375→                  title="Search in category"
   376→                >
   377→                  <input
   378→                    type="checkbox"
   379→                    checked={searchInCategory}
   380→                    onChange={(e) => setSearchInCategory(e.target.checked)}
   381→                    className="rounded border-gray-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500 h-4 w-4"
   382→                  />
   383→                  <svg
   384→                    className="w-4 h-4 ml-1.5 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-blue-600"
   385→                    fill="none"
   386→                    stroke="currentColor"
   387→                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   388→                  >
   389→                    <path
   390→                      strokeLinecap="round"
   391→                      strokeLinejoin="round"
   392→                      strokeWidth={2}
   393→                      d="M7 7h.01M7 3h5c.512 0 1.024.195 1.414.586l7 7a2 2 0 010 2.828l-7 7a2 2 0 01-2.828 0l-7-7A1.994 1.994 0 013 12V7a4 4 0 014-4z"
   394→                    />
   395→                  </svg>
   396→                </label>
   397→
   398→                <label
   399→                  className="flex items-center cursor-pointer group"
   400→                  title="Search in author"
   401→                >
   402→                  <input
   403→                    type="checkbox"
   404→                    checked={searchInAuthor}
   405→                    onChange={(e) => setSearchInAuthor(e.target.checked)}
   406→                    className="rounded border-gray-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500 h-4 w-4"
   407→                  />
   408→                  <svg
   409→                    className="w-4 h-4 ml-1.5 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-blue-600"
   410→                    fill="none"
   411→                    stroke="currentColor"
   412→                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   413→                  >
   414→                    <path
   415→                      strokeLinecap="round"
   416→                      strokeLinejoin="round"
   417→                      strokeWidth={2}
   418→                      d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
   419→                    />
   420→                  </svg>
   421→                </label>
   422→              </div>
   423→
   424→              {/* Divider */}
   425→              <div className="border-l border-gray-300 h-6"></div>
   426→
   427→              {/* Search Options with Icons */}
   428→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   429→                <label
   430→                  className="flex items-center cursor-pointer group"
   431→                  title="Case sensitive"
   432→                >
   433→                  <input
   434→                    type="checkbox"
   435→                    checked={caseSensitive}
   436→                    onChange={(e) => setCaseSensitive(e.target.checked)}
   437→                    className="rounded border-gray-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500 h-4 w-4"
   438→                  />
   439→                  <span className="ml-1.5 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-blue-600 font-mono text-xs">
   440→                    Aa
   441→                  </span>
   442→                </label>
   443→
   444→                <label
   445→                  className="flex items-center cursor-pointer group"
   446→                  title="Whole words only"
   447→                >
   448→                  <input
   449→                    type="checkbox"
   450→                    checked={wholeWords}
   451→                    onChange={(e) => setWholeWords(e.target.checked)}
   452→                    className="rounded border-gray-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500 h-4 w-4"
   453→                  />
   454→                  <span className="ml-1.5 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-blue-600 font-mono text-xs">
   455→                    |ab|
   456→                  </span>
   457→                </label>
   458→              </div>
   459→
   460→              {/* Divider */}
   461→              <div className="border-l border-gray-300 h-6"></div>
   462→
   463→              {/* Sort Controls */}
   464→              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   465→                {/* Sort Field Toggle */}
   466→                <div className="flex rounded-lg border border-gray-300 overflow-hidden">
   467→                  <button
   468→                    onClick={() => setSortField("date")}
   469→                    title="Sort by date"
   470→                    className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs transition-colors ${
   471→                      sortField === "date"
   472→                        ? "bg-blue-600 text-white"
   473→                        : "bg-white text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100"
   474→                    }`}
   475→                  >
   476→                    <svg
   477→                      className="w-4 h-4"
   478→                      fill="none"
   479→                      stroke="currentColor"
   480→                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   481→                    >
   482→                      <path
   483→                        strokeLinecap="round"
   484→                        strokeLinejoin="round"
   485→                        strokeWidth={2}
   486→                        d="M8 7V3m8 4V3m-9 8h10M5 21h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2z"
   487→                      />
   488→                    </svg>
   489→                  </button>
   490→                  <button
   491→                    onClick={() => setSortField("title")}
   492→                    title="Sort by title"
   493→                    className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs transition-colors ${
   494→                      sortField === "title"
   495→                        ? "bg-blue-600 text-white"
   496→                        : "bg-white text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100"
   497→                    }`}
   498→                  >
   499→                    <svg
   500→                      className="w-4 h-4"
   501→                      fill="none"
   502→                      stroke="currentColor"
   503→                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   504→                    >
   505→                      <path
   506→                        strokeLinecap="round"
   507→                        strokeLinejoin="round"
   508→                        strokeWidth={2}
   509→                        d="M3 4h13M3 8h9m-9 4h6m4 0l4-4m0 0l4 4m-4-4v12"
   510→                      />
   511→                    </svg>
   512→                  </button>
   513→                </div>
   514→
   515→                {/* Sort Direction Toggle */}
   516→                <button
   517→                  onClick={() =>
   518→                    setSortDirection(sortDirection === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc")
   519→                  }
   520→                  title={
   521→                    sortDirection === "asc"
   522→                      ? "Ascending (oldest/A-Z first)"
   523→                      : "Descending (newest/Z-A first)"
   524→                  }
   525→                  className="px-2 py-1 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 bg-white text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
   526→                >
   527→                  {sortDirection === "asc" ? (
   528→                    <svg
   529→                      className="w-4 h-4"
   530→                      fill="none"
   531→                      stroke="currentColor"
   532→                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   533→                    >
   534→                      <path
   535→                        strokeLinecap="round"
   536→                        strokeLinejoin="round"
   537→                        strokeWidth={2}
   538→                        d="M3 4h13M3 8h9m-9 4h9m5-4v12m0 0l-4-4m4 4l4-4"
   539→                      />
   540→                    </svg>
   541→                  ) : (
   542→                    <svg
   543→                      className="w-4 h-4"
   544→                      fill="none"
   545→                      stroke="currentColor"
   546→                      viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   547→                    >
   548→                      <path
   549→                        strokeLinecap="round"
   550→                        strokeLinejoin="round"
   551→                        strokeWidth={2}
   552→                        d="M3 4h13M3 8h9m-9 4h6m4 0l4-4m0 0l4 4m-4-4v12"
   553→                      />
   554→                    </svg>
   555→                  )}
   556→                </button>
   557→              </div>
   558→
   559→              {/* Divider */}
   560→              <div className="border-l border-gray-300 h-6"></div>
   561→
   562→              {/* Favorites Filter */}
   563→              <button
   564→                onClick={() => setShowOnlyFavorites(!showOnlyFavorites)}
   565→                title="Show only favorites"
   566→                className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium transition-all ${
   567→                  showOnlyFavorites
   568→                    ? "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 border-2 border-yellow-400"
   569→                    : "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-2 border-transparent hover:bg-gray-200"
   570→                }`}
   571→              >
   572→                <svg
   573→                  className="w-4 h-4"
   574→                  fill={showOnlyFavorites ? "currentColor" : "none"}
   575→                  stroke="currentColor"
   576→                  strokeWidth="1.5"
   577→                  viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   578→                >
   579→                  <path
   580→                    strokeLinecap="round"
   581→                    strokeLinejoin="round"
   582→                    d="M11.48 3.499a.562.562 0 011.04 0l2.125 5.111a.563.563 0 00.475.345l5.518.442c.499.04.701.663.321.988l-4.204 3.602a.563.563 0 00-.182.557l1.285 5.385a.562.562 0 01-.84.61l-4.725-2.885a.563.563 0 00-.586 0L6.982 20.54a.562.562 0 01-.84-.61l1.285-5.386a.562.562 0 00-.182-.557l-4.204-3.602a.563.563 0 01.321-.988l5.518-.442a.563.563 0 00.475-.345L11.48 3.5z"
   583→                  />
   584→                </svg>
   585→                <span>Favorites</span>
   586→              </button>
   587→
   588→              {/* Results Count */}
   589→              <div className="ml-auto text-xs text-gray-600">
   590→                {searchQuery ? (
   591→                  filteredStories.length > 0 ? (
   592→                    <span>
   593→                      <strong>{filteredStories.length}</strong> result
   594→                      {filteredStories.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
   595→                      {showOnlyFavorites && (
   596→                        <span className="text-yellow-600"> ★</span>
   597→                      )}
   598→                    </span>
   599→                  ) : (
   600→                    <span className="text-red-600">No results</span>
   601→                  )
   602→                ) : (
   603→                  <span>
   604→                    <strong>{categoryFilteredStories.length}</strong> in{" "}
   605→                    {activeTab}
   606→                    {showOnlyFavorites && (
   607→                      <>
   608→                        {" "}
   609→                        → <strong>{filteredStories.length}</strong> ★
   610→                      </>
   611→                    )}
   612→                  </span>
   613→                )}
   614→                <span className="text-gray-400 ml-2">
   615→                  {sortField === "date" ? "📅" : "🔤"}{" "}
   616→                  {sortDirection === "asc" ? "↑" : "↓"}
   617→                </span>
   618→              </div>
   619→            </div>
   620→          </div>
   621→        </div>
   622→
   623→        {/* Stories Display */}
   624→        {loading ? (
   625→          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-6 text-center text-gray-500 text-sm">
   626→            Loading stories...
   627→          </div>
   628→        ) : filteredStories.length === 0 ? (
   629→          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-6 text-center text-gray-500 text-sm">
   630→            {searchQuery
   631→              ? "No stories match your search."
   632→              : "No stories found in this category."}
   633→          </div>
   634→        ) : (
   635→          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
   636→            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
   637→              {filteredStories.map((story) => {
   638→                const isFavorited = favorites.has(story.id);
   639→                return (
   640→                  <article
   641→                    key={story.id}
   642→                    className="p-3 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
   643→                  >
   644→                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
   645→                      {/* Favorite Star Button */}
   646→                      <button
   647→                        onClick={() => toggleFavorite(story.id)}
   648→                        className="flex-shrink-0"
   649→                        title={
   650→                          isFavorited
   651→                            ? "Remove from favorites"
   652→                            : "Add to favorites"
   653→                        }
   654→                      >
   655→                        {isFavorited ? (
   656→                          <svg
   657→                            className="w-5 h-5 text-yellow-400 hover:text-yellow-500"
   658→                            fill="currentColor"
   659→                            viewBox="0 0 20 20"
   660→                          >
   661→                            <path d="M9.049 2.927c.3-.921 1.603-.921 1.902 0l1.07 3.292a1 1 0 00.95.69h3.462c.969 0 1.371 1.24.588 1.81l-2.8 2.034a1 1 0 00-.364 1.118l1.07 3.292c.3.921-.755 1.688-1.54 1.118l-2.8-2.034a1 1 0 00-1.175 0l-2.8 2.034c-.784.57-1.838-.197-1.539-1.118l1.07-3.292a1 1 0 00-.364-1.118L2.98 8.72c-.783-.57-.38-1.81.588-1.81h3.461a1 1 0 00.951-.69l1.07-3.292z" />
   662→                          </svg>
   663→                        ) : (
   664→                          <svg
   665→                            className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-300 hover:text-yellow-400"
   666→                            fill="none"
   667→                            stroke="currentColor"
   668→                            strokeWidth="1.5"
   669→                            viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   670→                          >
   671→                            <path
   672→                              strokeLinecap="round"
   673→                              strokeLinejoin="round"
   674→                              d="M11.48 3.499a.562.562 0 011.04 0l2.125 5.111a.563.563 0 00.475.345l5.518.442c.499.04.701.663.321.988l-4.204 3.602a.563.563 0 00-.182.557l1.285 5.385a.562.562 0 01-.84.61l-4.725-2.885a.563.563 0 00-.586 0L6.982 20.54a.562.562 0 01-.84-.61l1.285-5.386a.562.562 0 00-.182-.557l-4.204-3.602a.563.563 0 01.321-.988l5.518-.442a.563.563 0 00.475-.345L11.48 3.5z"
   675→                            />
   676→                          </svg>
   677→                        )}
   678→                      </button>
   679→
   680→                      {/* Content */}
   681→                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   682→                        {/* Title and Category */}
   683→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   684→                          <span className="inline-block px-1.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 rounded">
   685→                            {story.category}
   686→                          </span>
   687→                          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 flex-1">
   688→                            <a
   689→                              href={story.url}
   690→                              target="_blank"
   691→                              rel="noopener noreferrer"
   692→                              className="hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
   693→                            >
   694→                              {story.title}
   695→                            </a>
   696→                          </h2>
   697→                        </div>
   698→
   699→                        {/* Description */}
   700→                        {story.description && (
   701→                          <p className="text-gray-600 text-xs mb-1 line-clamp-1">
   702→                            {story.description}
   703→                          </p>
   704→                        )}
   705→
   706→                        {/* Metadata */}
   707→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-gray-500">
   708→                          <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
   709→                            <svg
   710→                              className="w-3 h-3"
   711→                              fill="none"
   712→                              stroke="currentColor"
   713→                              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
   714→                            >
   715→                              <path

    26→export default function EditStoryModal({

    33→}: EditStoryModalProps) {
    34→  const currentMonth = new Date().getMonth() + 1;
    35→  const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear();

    39→    url: "",
    40→    category: "",
    41→    description: "",
    42→    author: "",
    43→    publicationMonth: currentMonth,

    46→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

    55→    { value: 4, label: "April" },
    56→    { value: 5, label: "May" },
    57→    { value: 6, label: "June" },

    59→    { value: 8, label: "August" },

    62→    { value: 11, label: "November" },

    66→  const years = Array.from({ length: 11 }, (_, i) => currentYear - i);

    69→    if (story) {

    77→        publicationYear: story.publicationYear || currentYear,

    81→
    82→  const handleInputChange = (
    83→    e: React.ChangeEvent<
    84→      HTMLInputElement | HTMLTextAreaElement | HTMLSelectElement

    87→    const { name, value } = e.target;

    94→    }));

    97→    }

    99→

   115→
   116→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
   117→    e.preventDefault();
   118→    setError("");
   119→

   155→      if (!response.ok) {

   159→      onSuccess();
   160→      onClose();

   205→              required

   207→            />
   208→          </div>
   209→
   210→          {/* URL */}
   211→          <div>

   218→            <input

    15→

    32→

    34→    
    35→    setIsToggling(true);

    37→    try {

    47→      }

    49→      console.error('Error toggling favorite:', error);

    55→  return (

    82→                />
    83→              </svg>
    84→            </button>
    85→            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold flex-1">
    86→              <a 
    87→                href={url}
    88→                className="text-gray-900 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors duration-200"
    89→                target="_blank"
    90→                rel="noopener noreferrer"
    91→              >
    92→                {title}
    93→              </a>
    94→            </h2>
    95→          </div>
    96→          {description && (
    97→            <p className="text-gray-600 ml-7">{description}</p>
    98→          )}
    99→          <div className="flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 space-x-2 ml-7">
   100→            <span>{author}</span>

   102→            <time dateTime={timestamp}>
   103→              {formatTimestamp(timestamp)}

   105→          </div>
   106→        </div>
   107→
   108→        {/* Desktop Layout (single row) */}
   109→        <div className="hidden md:grid md:grid-cols-12 md:gap-4 md:items-center">

     1→import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2→import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
     3→
     4→export async function GET() {
     5→  try {
     6→    const stories = await prisma.story.findMany({
     7→      where: {
     8→        NOT: [
     9→          { author: "__SYSTEM__" },
    10→          { title: { startsWith: "__AUTHOR_PLACEHOLDER__" } },
    11→          { title: { startsWith: "__PLACEHOLDER__" } },
    12→        ],
    13→      },
    14→      orderBy: {
    15→        timestamp: "desc",
    16→      },
    17→    });
    18→    return NextResponse.json(stories);
    19→  } catch (error) {
    20→    console.error("Failed to fetch stories:", error);
    21→    return NextResponse.json(
    22→      { error: "Failed to fetch stories" },
    23→      { status: 500 },
    24→    );

    26→}

 `./src/app/api/stories/[id]/route.ts`
```
     1→import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
     2→import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
     3→import { checkAuth, unauthorizedResponse } from "@/lib/auth";
     4→
     5→export async function DELETE(
     6→  request: Request,
     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> },
     8→) {
     9→  // CHECK AUTHENTICATION FIRST!
    10→  if (!checkAuth(request)) {
    11→    return unauthorizedResponse();
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  try {
    15→    const { id } = await params;
    16→
    17→    await prisma.story.delete({
    18→      where: { id },
    19→    });
    20→
    21→    return NextResponse.json({
    22→      success: true,
    23→      message: "Story deleted successfully",
    24→    });
    25→  } catch (error) {
    26→    console.error("Error deleting story:", error);
    27→    return NextResponse.json(
    28→      { error: "Failed to delete story" },
    29→      { status: 500 },
    30→    );
    31→  }
    32→}
    33→
    34→export async function PATCH(
    35→  request: Request,
    36→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> },
    37→) {
    38→  // CHECK AUTHENTICATION FIRST!
    39→  if (!checkAuth(request)) {
    40→    return unauthorizedResponse();
    41→  }
    42→
    43→  try {
    44→    const { id } = await params;
    45→    const body = await request.json();
    46→
    47→    // only include valid story fields
    48→    const updateData: {
    49→      title?: string;
    50→      url?: string;
    51→      category?: string;
    52→      description?: string | null;
    53→      author?: string | null;
    54→      publicationMonth?: number | null;
    55→      publicationYear?: number | null;
    56→    } = {};
    57→
    58→    if (body.title !== undefined) updateData.title = body.title;
    59→    if (body.url !== undefined) updateData.url = body.url;
    60→    if (body.category !== undefined) updateData.category = body.category;
    61→    if (body.description !== undefined)
    62→      updateData.description = body.description;
    63→    if (body.author !== undefined) updateData.author = body.author;
    64→    if (body.publicationMonth !== undefined)
    65→      updateData.publicationMonth = body.publicationMonth;
    66→    if (body.publicationYear !== undefined)
    67→      updateData.publicationYear = body.publicationYear;
    68→
    69→    const updatedStory = await prisma.story.update({
    70→      where: { id },
    71→      data: updateData,
    72→    });
    73→
    74→    return NextResponse.json(updatedStory);
    75→  } catch (error) {
    76→    console.error("Error updating story:", error);
    77→    return NextResponse.json(
    78→      { error: "Failed to update story" },
    79→      { status: 500 },
    80→    );
    81→  }
    82→}
    83→
```
